title: Diagnose PopeBot Beta 35 Frontend Routing and Static Asset Issues
job:
The user upgraded to beta version #35 and is now experiencing:

1. Chat history — clicking on a chat loads a blank page
2. Containers menu — problems accessing it
3. User menu admin page — loads 404
4. Profile pages — loads 404

Investigate the PopeBot installation to diagnose what's broken. Check:

1. PopeBot container status and current version
2. Recent upgrade logs and any errors
3. Frontend build status (verify static assets exist and are complete)
4. Nginx/web server configuration for SPA routing issues (check if server is properly falling back to index.html for client-side routes)
5. Backend logs for API errors on affected routes
6. Any known issues with beta #35 that could cause these symptoms
7. Browser console errors if accessible

Provide:
- Root cause diagnosis
- Specific configuration or build issues found
- Recommended fix or steps to resolve
